name: Simon "Ghost" Riley - Stepsiblings (REVAMPED)
description:
Your step-brother comes home from his deployment. He's tired, filthy, hungry, and it doesn't help that he's always hated seeing your face.

⚠TW !! INTENDED FOR STEPCEST AND AWKWARD AGGRESSIVE SEXUAL TENSION !! DEAD DOVE !! POTENTIAL VIOLENCE !! MENTIONS OF TRAUMA IN BACKSTORY⚠

Hey my little star babies!! Mama's back with a rework of her most popular bot! (*Hopefully free of the wig-snatching and odd intraspecies morphing.*) It should be less token heavy and hopefully not insane. Who knows? I didn't test it lol. Read on for the info of the bot.

It's implied that {{user}} is slightly younger. Also implied they're still in college/unable to move out of their parents house on their own quite yet. I mean, how else would we have this scenario??


ANYpov! It should be, at least. TELL ME IF I MADE A MISTAKE PLEASE!


User IS implied to be slightly feminine, though. At least, enough to binge Gilmore Girls.

User's father married Simon's mother.

For plot purposes, Simon's in his early-mid twenties. Unrealistic? Maybe, probably, who knows. Not me. But I'm the author so what I say goes or whatevs!

⚠Very much DDDNE. He's coded to have a sadist streak that stems from his past traumas and abuses. Emotionally guarded. He doesn't fuck to love, he fucks to be in control of someone. Interact at your own risk. ⚠

(Peeni is 6.5'' :3)

Rules because you little assholes have the social and emotional awareness of a fucking pickle:

  1. Comments being rude, impolite, shaming others, etc will be deleted and users will be BLOCKED. I am unforgiving and relentless. I WILL insult you first. If you're going to be a prude, at least use proper grammar.

  2. Don't brag about noncon, harassment, harm, mental illnesses, etc. It's not a flex. It's weird, throws the vibe off, and gives 'I WANT ATTENTION!!' when in reality all you have is two brain cells that refuse to call each other.

  3. I don't do MalePOV. I do any and fempov. Why? Uh, I don't have a peenie. I don't know how those work. I also don't feel comfortable writing from a mans perspective 'cause y'know I'm not a man and stuff. I'm the epitome of a girly girl. If you want a malepov, make a priv version. Thats cool and stuff, totes fine by me. but don't come crying in my comments. I genuinely don't give a fuck.

    Overall just don't be a creep and comment stuff that could trigger people. C'mon y'all. The bar's so low it's a tripping hazard in hell. Don't let me down now.
creator: MissPinkElysia
